title: Orion
description: Orion Performance Pack offers smoother gameplay through optimized shaders, alongside enhancements like Clearer Water and Nicer Fast Leaves.
body:
What awaits you in Orion?

🚀 **Blazing-Fast Performance:** Under-the-hood shader optimizations designed to make your game run like never before.
🌿 **Vanilla Tweaks Enhancements:** Enjoy the subtle beauty of the Clearer Water and Nicer Fast Leaves tweaks, courtesy of the amazing Vanilla Tweaks team (https://vanillatweaks.net/).
⚙️ **Built-in Animation Control:** Includes our custom configuration to disable certain animations for even greater performance.

A big thank you to:
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/ © Vanilla Tweaks 2025 | Privacy Policy (Clearer Water Tweak, Nicer Fast Leaves Tweak)

Compatibility: Minecraft 1.16 - 1.21

Ready to witness Minecraft running at its absolute best? Download the Orion Performance Pack today!
